features.name: synopsys translate_off directive
features.description: Code should include a // synopsys translate_off comment directive that marks the beginning of code to be ignored during synthesis

features.name: synopsys translate_on directive
features.description: Code should include a // synopsys translate_on comment directive that marks the end of code to be ignored during synthesis

features.name: code between translate_off and translate_on
features.description: Code should include an assign statement between translate_off and translate_on directives that should be ignored during synthesis
